info.title: Plant Doctor API
info.description: API for plant disease diagnosis and health tracking

post.description:
POST /api/auth/login
Login user and return JWT token

POST /api/diagnoses/{diagnosis}/request-expert-review
Request expert review for a diagnosis

get.description:
GET /api/diseases
List diseases with search and filter

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by name, scientific name or description

name.description: Scientific name of the identified species
Common name of the detected disease

organ.description: Plant organ photographed for Pl@ntNet identification
